---
title: "About Us"
---

::: hero-panel
[Why This Matters]{.hero-kicker}

KAXA aims to promotes public understanding of space technologies and strengthens the local pipeline of future engineers, researchers, and innovators.
:::

:::::: grid-cards
::: theme-card
### Vision

A Cambodia where young people see natural science, aerospace, and space technology as an achievable path.
:::

::: theme-card
### Approach

Bridge inspiration and practical education through consistent content and events.
:::

::: theme-card
### Partnerships

Collaborate with universities, labs, and international professionals to scale impact.
:::
::::::

::::: hero-panel
[Our Global Members Map]{.hero-kicker}

Click any pin to view member profile details.

:::: member-map-wrap
::: {#member-map role="region" aria-label="KAXA member locations map"}
:::
::::

```{=html}
<script>
document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", async function () {
  const mapEl = document.getElementById("member-map");
  if (!mapEl) return;

  function loadLeaflet() {
    if (window.L) return Promise.resolve();
    return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
      const css = document.createElement("link");
      css.rel = "stylesheet";
      css.href = "https://unpkg.com/leaflet@1.9.4/dist/leaflet.css";
      document.head.appendChild(css);

      const script = document.createElement("script");
      script.src = "https://unpkg.com/leaflet@1.9.4/dist/leaflet.js";
      script.onload = () => resolve();
      script.onerror = () => reject(new Error("Leaflet failed to load"));
      document.body.appendChild(script);
    });
  }

  try {
    await loadLeaflet();
  } catch (e) {
    mapEl.innerHTML = '<p style="padding:1rem;color:#6b7280;">Map failed to load. Please refresh the page.</p>';
    return;
  }

  const mapWrapEl = mapEl.closest(".member-map-wrap");
  if (!mapWrapEl) return;

  const sheetEl = document.createElement("div");
  sheetEl.id = "map-sheet";
  sheetEl.className = "map-sheet";
  sheetEl.setAttribute("aria-live", "polite");
  sheetEl.innerHTML = [
    '<div class="map-sheet-head">',
    '<h4 id="map-sheet-title">Country Members</h4>',
    '<button type="button" id="map-sheet-close" class="map-sheet-close" aria-label="Close member list">Close</button>',
    "</div>",
    '<div id="map-sheet-list" class="map-sheet-list"></div>'
  ].join("");
  mapWrapEl.appendChild(sheetEl);

  const sheetTitleEl = document.getElementById("map-sheet-title");
  const sheetListEl = document.getElementById("map-sheet-list");
  const sheetCloseEl = document.getElementById("map-sheet-close");
  if (!sheetTitleEl || !sheetListEl || !sheetCloseEl) return;

  const map = L.map("member-map", {
    scrollWheelZoom: false,
    worldCopyJump: true,
    zoomControl: false
  }).setView([16, 110], 3);

  L.tileLayer("https://{s}.basemaps.cartocdn.com/light_nolabels/{z}/{x}/{y}{r}.png", {
    maxZoom: 6,
    minZoom: 2,
    attribution: "&copy; OpenStreetMap contributors &copy; CARTO"
  }).addTo(map);

  const members = [
    {
      name: "Mr. Tim Hoksong",
      title: "Researcher",
      summary: "MSc in Space Systems Engineering. Focused on engineering research and local capacity building.",
      location: "Institute of Technology of Cambodia, Phnom Penh, Cambodia",
      lat: 11.5686,
      lng: 104.8909,
      photo: "https://ui-avatars.com/api/?name=Tim+Hoksong&background=1f5cff&color=fff&size=160&bold=true"
    },
    {
      name: "Mr. Ly Pechvattana",
      title: "Industrial Engineer Officer",
      summary: "BS in Robotics and Automation Engineering. Works on robotics development in industry.",
      location: "DENSO Cambodia, Phnom Penh, Cambodia",
      lat: 11.5564,
      lng: 104.9282,
      photo: "https://ui-avatars.com/api/?name=Ly+Pechvattana&background=00a3ff&color=fff&size=160&bold=true"
    },
    {
      name: "Mr. Him Vanthong",
      title: "Master Student",
      summary: "Currently studying aserospace engineering at University of Ulsan",
      location: "Ulsan, South Korea",
      lat: 36.0133,
      lng: 129.3239,
      photo: "https://ui-avatars.com/api/?name=Him+Vanthong&background=4756ff&color=fff&size=160&bold=true"
    },
    {
      name: "Mr. Hort Sovanvichea",
      title: "Master Student",
      summary: "Currently studying aircraft engineering at Samara University",
      location: "Samara, Russia",
      lat: 53.21200979716291,
      lng: 50.177442284332635,
      photo: "https://ui-avatars.com/api/?name=Him+Vanthong&background=4756ff&color=fff&size=160&bold=true"
    }
  ];

  const countryGroups = [
    {
      country: "Cambodia",
      lat: 12.8,
      lng: 104.9,
      members: members.filter((m) => m.location.includes("Cambodia"))
    },
    {
      country: "South Korea",
      lat: 36.4,
      lng: 127.9,
      members: members.filter((m) => m.location.includes("South Korea"))
    },
    {
      country: "Russia",
      lat: 55.9, 
      lng: 37.8,
      members: members.filter((m) => m.location.includes("Russia"))
    }
  ];

  countryGroups.forEach((group) => {
    const icon = L.divIcon({
      className: "country-dot-wrap",
      html: `<span class="country-dot">${group.members.length}</span>`,
      iconSize: [30, 30],
      iconAnchor: [15, 15]
    });

    const marker = L.marker([group.lat, group.lng], { icon }).addTo(map);

    marker.on("click", function () {
      const listHtml = group.members.map((member) => `
        <div class="member-item">
          <img src="${member.photo}" alt="Profile image of ${member.name}" class="member-avatar">
          <div class="member-meta">
            <h4>${member.name}</h4>
            <p class="member-title">${member.title}</p>
            <p>${member.summary}</p>
            <p class="member-location">${member.location}</p>
          </div>
        </div>
      `).join("");

      sheetTitleEl.innerHTML = `${group.country} <span class="country-count">${group.members.length}</span>`;
      sheetListEl.innerHTML = listHtml;
      sheetEl.classList.add("is-open");

      map.panTo([group.lat, group.lng], { animate: true, duration: 0.35 });
    });
  });

  sheetCloseEl.addEventListener("click", function () {
    sheetEl.classList.remove("is-open");
  });
});
</script>
```
:::::
